businessGlossary.businessGlossaryCreateTerm_component: Click here à Créer a Nouveau Term. Termes are words ou phrases avec a specific business Définition assigned à them.
businessGlossary.businessGlossaryCreateTermGroup_componen: Click here à Créer a Nouveau Terme Group. Terme Groupes act as folders, containing Termes et nested Terme Groups. pour example, there could be a PII Terme Groupe containing Termes pour different types de PII, such as Email ou Phone Number. Learn Plus about the Business Glossaire here.
businessGlossary.businessGlossaryIntro_component: Welcome à the Business Glossary! The Glossaire is a collection de structured, standarized labels you can use à categorize Données assets. You can Afficher et Créer both Termes et Terme Groupes here.

domains.createDomains_component: Click here à Créer a Nouveau Domain.
domains.domainIntro_component: Welcome à DataHub Domains! Domaines are collections de related Données assets associated avec a specific part de your organization, such as the Marketing department. Learn Plus about Domaines here.

entityProfile.documentation_component: You can Afficher et Modifier an entity's Documentation on this tab. Documentation should provide descriptive information about this Données asset. It can also contain links à external resources.
entityProfile.domains_component: You can Afficher et set this asset's Domaine here. Domaines are collections de related Données assets associated avec a specific part de your organization, such as the Marketing department. Learn Plus about Domaines here.
entityProfile.entities_component: You can Afficher the Entities that belong à a Container on this tab.
entityProfile.glossaryTerm_component: You can Afficher et Ajouter Glossaire Termes à this asset here. Glossaire Termes are structured, standarized labels pour organizing your mission-critical data. pour example, if you're marking assets containing PII fields, you might Ajouter the Terme Email. Learn Plus about Glossaire Termes here.
entityProfile.lineage_component: You can Afficher an entity's Lignée on this tab. Données Lignée allows you à visualize et understand both the upstream dependencies et downstream consumers de this entity. If this tab is disabled, Lignée have not been ingested pour this entity.
entityProfile.owners_component: You can Afficher et Ajouter Propriétaires à this asset here. Propriétaires are Utilisateurs ou Groupes who are responsible pour managing this asset.
entityProfile.properties_component: You can Afficher an entity's key-value Properties on this tab. These are sourced de the original Données Platform. If this tab is disabled, Properties have not been ingested pour this entity.
entityProfile.schema_component: You can Afficher a Dataset's Schéma on this tab. You can also Afficher ou Ajouter Documentation, Tags, et Glossaire Termes pour specific columns.
entityProfile.tags_component: You can Afficher et Ajouter Étiquettes à this asset here. Étiquettes are labels pour organizing your data. pour example, you can Ajouter a Étiquette à mark an asset as Mission Critical. Learn Plus about Étiquettes here.

groups.createGroups_component: Click here à Créer a Nouveau Group.
groups.groupsIntro_component: Welcome à Datahub Groups! Groupes are collections de Utilisateurs which can be used à assign ownership à assets et manage access. Groupes can be created natively within DataHub, ou synced de your Identity Provider. Learn Plus about Groupes here.

homePage.domains_component: Here are your organization's Domains. Domaines are collections de Données assets - such as Tables, Dashboards, et ML Models - that make it easy à discover information relevant à a particular part de your organization.
homePage.ingestion_component: Start integrating your Données sources immediately par navigating à the Ingestion page.
homePage.platforms_component: Here are your organization's Données Platforms. Données Platforms represent specific third-party Données Systems ou Tools. Examples include Données Warehouses like Snowflake, Orchestrators like Airflow, et Dashboarding tools like Looker.
homePage.searchBar_component: This is the Rechercher Bar. It will serve as your launch point pour discovering et collaborating around the Données most important à you. Not sure where à start? Click on Explore All!
